variants.text: How the Instagram Algorithm Works: Instagram uses multiple ranking systems across Feed, Stories, Reels, and Explore.

How the Instagram Algorithm Works

Instagram uses multiple ranking systems across Feed, Stories, Reels, and Explore. Signals typically include relationship, interest, and timeliness — exact weights change, so treat explanations as models, not guarantees.

How the Instagram Algorithm Works

Key takeaways:
• Different surfaces rank content differently
• Relationship and interest signals are durable themes
• Avoid claiming fixed ranking formulas
